message.happycreeper.need_to_weaken_firs: You need to weaken this creeper first.
message.happycreeper.need_creeper_head: You must wear a creeper head or a Happy Creeper Mask to weaken this creeper.
message.happycreeper.already_tamed: This creeper is already your friend.
message.happycreeper.already_full_health: Your creeper is already at full health.
message.happycreeper.creeper_tamed: The creeper is now your friend.
message.happycreeper.creeper_recolored_h: Your creeper is happy green again.
message.happycreeper.creeper_following: Your creeper is following you again.
message.happycreeper.creeper_equipped_ar: Your creeper equipped that armor piece.
message.happycreeper.creeper_removed_arm: You removed one of your creeper's armor pieces.
message.happycreeper.potion_no_effect: That potion has no effect to apply.
